rules_version = '2';

service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
    
    // 🔒 SECURE RULES FOR IPD FOOD TRACKING APP
    // Replace wide-open rules with authentication-based access
    
    // ===== EMPLOYEES COLLECTION =====
    match /employees/{employeeId} {
      // ✅ Allow read access for authenticated users (for reports)
      allow read: if request.auth != null;
      
      // ✅ Allow creation for new employee registration
      allow create: if request.auth == null 
                    && isValidEmployee(resource.data)
                    && !employeeExistsByPhone(resource.data.phoneNumber);
      
      // ✅ Allow updates only by the employee themselves or admin
      allow update: if request.auth != null 
                    && (request.auth.uid == employeeId || isAdmin());
      
      // ❌ Delete only by admin (for data cleanup)
      allow delete: if request.auth != null && isAdmin();
    }
    
    // ===== MEALS COLLECTION =====
    match /meals/{mealId} {
      // ✅ Allow read for meal reports (authenticated users only)
      allow read: if request.auth != null;
      
      // ✅ Allow meal recording by the employee or admin
      allow create: if request.auth != null 
                    && (request.auth.uid == resource.data.employeeId || isAdmin())
                    && isValidMeal(resource.data);
      
      // ✅ Allow meal updates by the employee or admin  
      allow update: if request.auth != null 
                    && (request.auth.uid == resource.data.employeeId || isAdmin())
                    && isValidMeal(request.resource.data);
      
      // ❌ Delete only by admin
      allow delete: if request.auth != null && isAdmin();
    }
    
    // ===== ADMIN COLLECTION (if needed) =====
    match /admin/{document} {
      // 🔒 Admin-only access for configuration
      allow read, write: if request.auth != null && isAdmin();
    }
    
    // ===== HELPER FUNCTIONS =====
    
    // Check if user is admin
    function isAdmin() {
      // Option 1: Custom claims (recommended)
      return request.auth.token.admin == true;
      
      // Option 2: Admin user list (simpler but less secure)
      // return request.auth.uid in ['ADMIN_UID_1', 'ADMIN_UID_2'];
    }
    
    // Validate employee data structure
    function isValidEmployee(data) {
      return data.keys().hasAll(['phoneNumber', 'fullName'])
             && data.phoneNumber is string
             && data.fullName is string
             && data.phoneNumber.matches('^[+]?[0-9]{8,15}$')  // Basic phone validation
             && data.fullName.size() >= 2;
    }
    
    // Check if phone number already exists
    function employeeExistsByPhone(phoneNumber) {
      // Note: This requires a composite index on phoneNumber
      return exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/employees/$(phoneNumber));
    }
    
    // Validate meal data structure
    function isValidMeal(data) {
      return data.keys().hasAll(['employeeId', 'date', 'ate'])
             && data.employeeId is string
             && data.date is string
             && data.ate is bool
             && data.date.matches('^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$')  // YYYY-MM-DD format
             && data.employeeId.size() > 0;
    }
    
    // ===== FALLBACK RULE =====
    // ❌ Deny all other access by default
    match /{document=**} {
      allow read, write: if false;
    }
  }
}

/*
🛡️ SECURITY FEATURES IMPLEMENTED:

✅ Authentication Required: All operations require auth except employee registration
✅ Authorization: Users can only modify their own data, admins have full access  
✅ Data Validation: All input data is validated for structure and format
✅ Phone Uniqueness: Prevents duplicate employee registrations
✅ Admin Protection: Admin operations require special permissions
✅ Fallback Deny: Blocks all unauthorized access by default

🔧 SETUP REQUIRED:

1. Deploy these rules: firebase deploy --only firestore:rules
2. Set up admin custom claims in Firebase Auth
3. Create composite indexes as needed
4. Test rules with Firebase Emulator Suite

📋 TODO BEFORE PRODUCTION:

- [ ] Replace wide-open rules in Firebase Console
- [ ] Set up admin custom claims or update admin UID list
- [ ] Test all rule scenarios with Firebase Emulator
- [ ] Monitor security events in Firebase Console
- [ ] Set up alerting for rule violations
*/
